caption: A woman with her hair in a high bun is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. She is smiling and looking slightly to her left, with a professional microphone positioned in front of her. The background features a white wall and a black partition separated by a vertical yellow stripe. To the left, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text. On-screen graphics include a circular logo that says "PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "boss talk 101". Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains in a consistent pose and expression, with very minimal movement, maintaining her smile and gaze as the scene stays static.
